sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at cols 14-18, navigate to 5th room (cols 38-42)
result = action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24:
        print(f"After 4x RIGHT: player at {n['boundary']}")
        break

# Press SPACE at 5th room
result = action(['SPACE'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24:
        print(f"After SPACE: player at {n['boundary']}")
        break
print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check indicator squares
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 16 and n['color'] in ['b', 'w', 'g', 'G']:
        b = n['boundary']
        if b[0][0] < 6:
            print(f"Indicator: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={b}")

# Check maze - focus on 5th room area
ascii_grid = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nMaze (rows 7-15, cols 37-45):")
for i in range(7, 16):
    row = ascii_grid[i]
    print(f"Row {i:2d}: {row[37:45]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
